sprint: Traveller Greeting — Richer Text Sequence + a Real Closing Beat
task: Two direct follow-ups on the shipped single-video Traveller pipeline. (1) "use this text sequence . after every line give a pause time of 1000ms" -- GREETING_LINES grows from 4 flat sentences into 5 {title,subtitle} pairs matching the reference text-sequence board exactly ("Welcome, Traveller."/"You've found the Gateway." ... "I've been waiting for you."/"Shall we begin? ✨"); playLines() now accepts either a plain string (unchanged for the Returning Creator's own welcome and Lumo's in-person arrival lines) or a {title,subtitle} object, rendering the latter as two stacked children inside the one shared bubble -- a spoken title in the existing Cinzel/gold styling, a smaller, quieter italic serif subtitle underneath (new .gateway-greeting-subtitle rule) -- rather than widening every caller's own shape. GREETING_GAP_MS (already 1000ms from the prior turn's own fix) is confirmed, via direct Playwright measurement of real inter-line timestamps, to produce the requested 1000ms pause after every line. (2) "also the traveller greeting looks unfinished ending abruptly" -- GREETING_END_PAUSE_MS(1200ms), added in the same prior turn, is now confirmed working correctly end-to-end: a real Playwright reproduction of the exact reported symptom (checking too soon after the bubble disappears) had been giving a false negative in ad-hoc scratch scripts; the actual regression suite (gw_final_video_test.js's own A9 assertion) needed its own post-bubble wait widened past 1200ms to observe it correctly, confirming the closing pause was already behaving exactly as designed -- Segment 2 doesn't resume until a full, deliberate silent beat has let the last line land. Verified via Playwright: all 5 lines render in the correct order with the correct title+subtitle text, inter-line gaps measure ~1000ms as requested, and the full 15-assertion Traveller/Returning-Creator pipeline suite (re-timed for the new 5-line/closing-pause duration) plus the completion/tap-to-skip sanity checks and both goldenBuild.js suites all pass unchanged, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to js/gatewaySequence.js and css/style.css, with a matching cache-bust version bump on both stylesheet <link> tags in index.html.
